name: Vanguard
notes: Basic-tier Commander, Capital-only via Command Centre. maxSquadsLed caps its regiment at 4 squads (see game-design/07-data-architecture.md's 4b/4d). Speed-boost aura is scoped by filter "own_regiment" rather than proximity — radius is set high purely so distance never gates it; the regiment membership (commanderId) is what actually determines who gets the 1.8x boost, not being physically nearby.
